retention.title: Log Retention Policy
retention.desc: Logs older than the retention period will be automatically cleaned up
retention.rangeError: Please enter an integer between {min} and {max}

storage.title: Storage Management
storage.desc: Monitor database size and configure auto-cleanup thresholds
storage.minValueError: Please enter a value no less than {min}
storage.logExceedsDbError: Log table limit should not exceed database limit

importExport.title: Config Import/Export
importExport.desc: Export current config or restore from file
importExport.importWarning: Import will overwrite current providers, mappings, keys and other config. Security settings (password, JWT) will be preserved.
